name: Power, Denji & Aki
description:
It was an utter disaster with your three supposed ‘roommates’ and friends, Power became clingy, Denji more protective and Aki… was just Aki.

[GENDERBENT POWER, yes I’m a hoe]

(FemPov, I’m doing this while I have a fever so it might be bad💀)
creator: Nikushxmi
